reviews.name: places/ChIJo8DfUdcKmYARRoANRO9Qq-Q/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPdGJHMExBEAE
reviews.text:
It was easy to book an appointment. You have to pay 50% when you book. They'll email you an intake and information packet, which you fill out and send back. I took the bio energy tests and blood tests to be evaluated for bio identical hormone replacement therapy. I tried the HCG diet, but I could not stick to the diet... Certainly not my doctor's fault.

The staff is professional and the clinic is very busy, so book asap and consider that you may have to wait weeks to be seen. They have patients from all over the country. I've witnessed the staff dealing with unhappy patients who did not follow instructions and ended up missing appointments.  It's upsetting for everyone, but you have to be responsible for listening to instructions and showing up on time.

I'm very happy with Dr Hanson.  And happy with my treatment and interactions with staff.

reviews.name: places/ChIJo8DfUdcKmYARRoANRO9Qq-Q/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkZ3Z6dVhREAE
reviews.text:
In 40 years I have seen many doctors in many cities across the country, from Connecticut to New York to Missouri to California and Nevada. And many type of doctors ranging from traditional MDs to gynecologist , alternative medicine doctors, DO's surgeons, and pediatricians. I have never been treated so poorly as in this practice.

If I had a question and called about a prescription or a problem, the doctors in other practices, always called me back within 24 hours, even during Covid. In the worst case, at least a nurse practitioner called me back, who could answer the question with authority and knowledge. And in some cases, I could just ask the question online and they would get back to me that day.

After seeing Dr. Hanson, he gave me a prescription which I had filled and tried. After two weeks, I had a problem with it and talked with the pharmacist, who was fantastic. The pharmacist told me to call the doctor and the doctor would make a minor change. I was on vacation and when I got back I tried to reach Dr. Hanson.

I called Dr. Hansons office and left a message but never got a return call. I called again and had to leave another message. A few days later a woman called me back. I explained the problem and asked for the doctor to call me back. This happened twice. The third call they told me I needed to come in and have blood work done, but I told them AGAIN I had stopped taking the medicine and the bloodwork would be the same as the original bloodwork I had done. I asked to talk with the doctor for five minutes to explain the problem with the prescription. I also told them the pharmacist said it would just be a small change to the prescription.

They said the doctor would not be willing to talk with me. I have to say I was flabbergasted! Why would I want to make an appointment with the Doctor who wouldn't take five minutes to pick up the phone and call me back about a problem I had with a prescription?

I had only seen Dr Hanson twice but I have to say he was absolutely no help in solving a very minor problem.

Save your money this place is not worth your frustration. They are way more concerned about your money, not your health!

I also had an IV there, the woman was talking negatively about other employees in front of patients and seemed bothered by having to work.  There are many places in Reno that are less expensive and much more pleasant.

reviews.text:
Been coming here about a year. The nurses (both male and female) are all great at what they do and pleasant to banter with during visits. I get routine bloodwork and friendly advice with dose adjustments accordingly. The care aspect is 5 stars. I took away 2 stars  because whoever works the front desk on Wednesdays exhibits every symptom of narcissistic personality disorder, and will not stop harassing me. I don’t even know her name. Earlier in the year I overheard her talking to 2 clients in the waitroom about her pregnancy. One of the clients started to bring up another topic and she “jokingly” told him he’d have to leave if he wasn’t there to “honor her”. From then on I just kept my head down and minded my own business. It then became apparent that she was going around to nurses spreading lies and gossiping about me to anyone who would listen. I can only assume this was because I didn’t properly “honor her” with attention. The lies and slander on me was apparent by how her replacements at the front desk were treating me when she was on leave. When she returned from maternity leave, I brought her French pastries (Macarons) to congratulate her on the new baby and demonstrate I had no ill-will toward her. I was born and raised in Wisconsin. We practice this weird phenomenon called “authentic acts of kindness to our neighbor”. I was hoping this would get her to leave me alone, but it only intensified her harassment and stalking. In following weeks I would leave the building, and in the time it took me to get to my car and pull out she would get up from behind the desk grab 2 clients to rush outside to have a pretend conversation just so she could judge what car I drove. She would then use this information to spot me pulling up for treatment, then scurry into rooms to tell nurses to mock my appearance with her before I walked in the door. She’d also “conveniently” get  up to fill a large water bottle at the water station when my nurse came out to deter me from being able to take one of my pills with water. Lol like what are you 13? I would be feeling bullied and shamed if I was in middle school, but as mature adult man I recognize this behavior for the clearance rack energy that it is. I’m just waiting for the coworkers to start connecting dots. She wants to provoke me into a reaction, but I just don’t care that much. I feel sad she’s panini pressed over a stranger who doesn’t even know her name, but it’s giving Karen. She should probably stop escalating though before she starts violating HIPAA laws next (if she hasn’t already). If she wants to heal, a therapist who specializes in NPD would help her work through the obvious childhood wounding of having been bullied and/or not feeling seen by parents. Or she can just do what I enjoy doing and that’s  minding my own business. Took my business to another Ageless men location where the front desk worker doesn't have an odd obsession with me.

Kind regards - WW

reviews.name: places/ChIJzTFKfFLPyIARSSSutgzZcYY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfc083OEtREAE
reviews.text:
Today I had my first appointment at Genesis Lifestyle Clinic in Henderson, and I was immediately impressed by the beautifully decorated space and welcoming atmosphere. After researching different clinics in the area, I felt confident this clinic offered everything I was looking for, especially with my medical background.

From the moment I arrived, Imara, the clinic’s Support Services Specialist, greeted me warmly. Her friendly and professional demeanor made me feel at ease, both when I scheduled my appointment and when I met her in person at the front desk.

The intake process was thorough but straightforward, with questions designed to assess my overall health and fitness—not just my weight concerns and goals. Tiffany, my intake clinician, efficiently took my blood pressure, conducted basic diagnostics, and asked additional health-related questions before guiding me through a detailed Body Composition Analysis, including my Basal Metabolic Rate. She also reviewed my results briefly and offered helpful advice, such as increasing my exercise routine, drinking more water, and incorporating more lean proteins and healthy fats into my diet, as recommended by the Genesis Lifestyle protocols.

Next, I met with Eric, the nurse practitioner, who explained the clinic’s team-based approach and laid out a clear, practical plan to help me reach my weight loss and overall health goals. I really appreciated how thoughtful and sensible his guidance was.

Before I left, Heather, the Practice Manager, checked in with me to ensure I felt comfortable with the plan and answered any questions I had. She explained my options for either coming into the office for medication administration or attending a class to learn how to do home injections. They also offer supplements and Vitamin B6 and B12 options, which have reportedly been effective for other patients.

The entire team made me feel supported and confident about moving forward with the plan. I highly recommend Genesis Lifestyle Clinic to anyone looking for a personalized, comprehensive approach to their health and wellness goals.

I’ll be checking in monthly to keep you all updated on my progress—stay tuned!

reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
As a mom, wife, and business owner, I don’t just notice service — I notice details. And you can immediately tell Regenerate Medical Concierge is locally owned because the care, intention, and attention to detail are unmatched. This isn’t corporate, rushed, or cookie-cutter. This is personal.

From day one, the communication has been clear, consistent, and thoughtful. The staff is warm, welcoming, and genuinely invested — the kind of place where you feel remembered, not processed.

Dr. Amin deserves a special shoutout. He is incredibly patient, takes time to answer every question, and never makes you feel rushed or brushed off. As someone who asks a lot of questions (especially when it comes to my health and my family), that level of care matters.

I’ve done HydraFacials with Jill, and she is amazing — gentle, knowledgeable, and meticulous. Recently, Jill also did immunity drips for my 10-year-old and 12-year-old before our trip to the Philippines. As a mom, this meant everything. She made their first-time experience calm, caring, and completely non-traumatic, explaining each step and moving at their pace so they felt safe and supported the entire time.

I’m also currently on their GLOW injection, and let me just say — I feel it. I’m 43 years young, and Regenerate is helping me stay healthy, energized, and glowing while juggling family, business, and nonstop travel. This isn’t about “anti-aging,” it’s about aging well and feeling strong — and they truly understand that.

If you want concierge-level care that treats you like family, respects your time, and actually delivers — this is the place. I trust them with myself and my kids, and that’s the highest endorsement I can give.

Highly recommend. No gatekeeping. 💖✨

reviews.name: places/ChIJgy6lhY_RyIAR9gtuclTU8ZE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VMWEx0TzcwMHV5Q3R3RRAB
reviews.text: I came to Dr. Rob a little over a year ago after having minimal success (10 years) treating my chronic lyme/co-infections, Hashimoto's, chronic fatigue, and pain. My gut was destroyed by years of antibiotics.  I was literally at my wits end as my previously very active lifestyle was no longer available to me.  Dr. Rob was very straight forward with me and told me that chronic lyme is difficult but that given time he felt he could improve my current condition..  My husband is an MD who was unfamiliar with Dr. Rob's methods of functional medicine.  We were desperate and had nothing to lose at this point.  After meeting Dr. Rob we were both impressed (and continue to be) by his vast knowledge and the science behind his treatments.  He combines several modalities in his treatment and individualizes his treatment for each patient.  I fly out to see him every 4-6 months.  I am tested and meet with him to discuss the plan and adjust the treatment as needed.  I have seen dramatic improvement.  One of my hashimoto antibodies is completely gone and the other one is reduced by half.  The pain in my legs have improved and my back pain is gone.  My energy is improving along with my mood.  My lyme and bartonnella are continuing to improve, and  I am confident we will get there.  Dr. Rob wants the healing for me as much as I do and that is saying a lot about him as a human being.  He is enthusiastic and intuitive...he likes the challenge of figuring it out.  He is pretty special, and I feel blessed to have found him.  Ps His staff is great so that makes the monthly trips and treatment even better.

reviews.name: places/ChIJgy6lhY_RyIAR9gtuclTU8ZE/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VQSEp2SmY0blBlNE9BEAE
reviews.text: I have been seeing Dr. Rob for over a year for a very complex neurological problem which affects the spinal cord and the peripheral nervous system. Hashimoto’s and Sjogren’s add to further complicate the puzzle. No answers were provided by allopathic medicine including the esteemed meccas such as Cleveland Clinic and Mayo Clinic. When I researched Dr. DeMartino’s expertise on Quantum Neurology and reversing autoimmune conditions I knew he was the right physician for me. Despite having a condition that has been present for over 20 years I am experiencing improvement in leg strength and my gait looks much better! reviews.text:
I would give 0 stars if I could. My husband went to Dr. Shahab Mokhtare at Cenegencis for testosterone therapy to address low testosterone, and it completely ruined our chances of having children naturally. Dr. Mokhtare never discussed the risks of testosterone therapy, particularly how it could impact fertility. By the time we had the conversation about fertility, my husband's sperm count was already at zero due to the therapy.

Dr. Mokhtare prescribed fertility medication and told us his sperm count would return in 3-6 months, but after two and a half years of fertility treatments and thousands of dollars spent, his count never recovered. We consulted with multiple fertility doctors and male fertility specialists, all of whom confirmed that the testosterone therapy caused his azoospermia.

Dr. Mokhtare was negligent in his treatment. He should have tested my husband's sperm count before and during treatment to ensure it remained at an acceptable level. He could have suggested alternatives to preserve fertility or at least explained the risks of testosterone therapy thoroughly before proceeding. Instead, we’re left with a situation that has cost us $80,000 in fertility treatments.

For the record, I even reached out to Dr. Mokhtare via email to discuss this privately, and I never received a response, which says a lot about his professionalism and character. Any man considering testosterone therapy and hoping to have children should learn from our experience and think carefully about their fertility. Don’t trust doctors who prioritize profit over your well-being.

reviews.text: I have been working with Rachel since July 2025. I initially reached out to her because she has the specific expertise I was seeking. I also love how easy it is for me to see Rachel. Because I live in a different part of the state - outside of Las Vegas - I see Rachel via telehealth appointment. She is on her game at every appointment. She takes her time to thoroughly review and explain my labs and answer any and all questions I may have. She listens to my concerns, and works thoughtfully to address areas I need support. I am so grateful to have a provider who knows her stuff, is very smart and accomplished in her field, and who is willing to become a true partner in my health journey. I am excited to continue my relationship with Rachel and Halcyon so I may work toward living my best life as I age gracefully! I wish all my friends were also seeing Rachel! She is a rare, wonderful, magical unicorn of a healthcare provider. Her knowledge and expertise are killer. Thank you Rachel!

reviews.text:
As first-time visitors to the US, needing medical care was the last thing we expected. We weren’t US citizens or residents, and we didn’t have insurance so were anxious about how complicated and expensive it might be.

Finding Long Life Med changed everything.

Booking an appointment was fast and surprisingly simple. The team was responsive, professional, and genuinely caring. David explained clearly and thoroughly all our medical concerns, no rushing, no confusion. We didn’t just receive treatment; we left feeling informed and reassured.

What truly stood out was how they went the extra mile. When the medicine we needed wasn’t available at the pharmacy near our Airbnb, they helped us find it without hesitation. That level of service is rare.

If they can make healthcare this seamless for international visitors without insurance, I can only imagine how valuable their membership program must be for US citizens. Having reliable, accessible medical support when you need it most is not just convenient, it’s peace of mind.

Highly recommended.

reviews.text: TRTMD Health Clinic was an amazing experience and went beyond my expectations. She is available for questions and has checked in with me a few times since starting treatments to make sure it’s all going well. I am so glad I came to this clinic. I have already recommended it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJdToSUzC_yIARmPfJTfwMfvY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pnNVNIcDRlbkpWVVdaM05Ha3lkM2RFUVV4TFdrRRAB
reviews.text: To everyone that is looking into this clinic. Dr T is an amazing doctor and individual. He is extremely patient and explains everything to a point where you as a person understands. When the nurses are busy with other patients Sheila can order your meds for you. The nurses are extremely patient and very helpful as well. To sum everything up this clinic helped me in so many ways it’s unbelievable. One way Dr. T helped me with weight loss and my low testosterone levels. Now I have so much more energy and more drive in life. Night and day different, the blood tests are pretty intense but it’s needed. Why it’s needed is because Dr T needs to know your levels on different categories so he knows to up your dosage or bring it down. Obviously it’s a case by case basis of course. I highly recommend this clinic to anyone and everyone.

reviews.text:
Life-Changing Hormone Balancing Experience!

I have been a loyal client of Jocelyn's for well-over a year now, and I cannot express how grateful I am to her for helping me balance my hormones.

I am 50 years old and have felt sluggish for years. Since starting the pelleting treatment, I have experienced a remarkable transformation in my overall well-being.

First and foremost, my energy levels have skyrocketed. I now wake up every morning feeling refreshed and ready to take on the day. The fatigue and sluggishness that used to plague me are a thing of the past. I feel like I'm in my 20s again! I am building muscle at the gym and no longer wake up in the middle of the night with hot flashes.

Not only has my energy improved, but my libido has also received a much-needed boost. The increase in my sex drive has greatly enhanced my intimate relationship with my partner. It's like rediscovering the passion we had in the early days of our relationship.

One of the most significant changes I've noticed is the general feeling of well-being that now accompanies me throughout the day. I feel happier, more positive, and more emotionally balanced. The constant mood swings and irritability I used to experience have vanished, allowing me to enjoy a more harmonious and joyful life.

I cannot recommend Rejuve enough for exceptional hormone balancing services. Jocelyn is knowledgeable, professional, and genuinely cares about her patients' well-being. Hormone therapy has truly transformed my life, and I am forever grateful.

If you're looking to regain your vitality, energy, and overall sense of well-being, I urge you to give Jocelyn at Rejuve a try. You won't be disappointed!"

reviews.text: Fantastic staff!  Dr. Gunderson knows more about the practice of medicine than anyone else I've ever met.  I lost 28lbs on the HCG diet when I did it with my wife through DR. G!

reviews.name: places/ChIJf7j3CEAVmYAR1g_S9KVjNPU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psbmFVOHlkVlUwTkVKQlRFWnJiR3M0YTBReVozYxAB
reviews.text:
I normally don’t leave reviews, but I felt this needed to be said for the sake of other patients.I truly like Dr. Gunderson and have had positive experiences with his care, which is why this is especially disappointing to write. Unfortunately, my overall experience at the office has been negatively impacted by one of the older medical assistants.

This isn’t my first experience with her, and the pattern has been consistent. Not only is she pushy, but she often seems frazzled and frantic, especially when multiple patients are present. It gives the impression of disorganization and creates an environment that feels rushed and uncomfortable rather than calm and professional.In general, she comes across as unprofessional and overly forceful. The way she speaks to both patients and other staff members feels undermining and uncomfortable to witness, which does not reflect well on the office as a whole.

What concerned me most was hearing her openly discuss other patients within earshot of the lobby. That lack of discretion regarding patient privacy felt extremely inappropriate.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ21OOSIZAmYARv19W9vLxc7w/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZdXVyV09nEAE
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable doctor, has a good program and decent prices. The tech that gives the shots is very good as well. My only gripe really is I wish the hours were a bit different and not many appt times available like ever. Also one week I forgot and I thought I’d have the same appt time next week but that didn’t happen. Had to miss two weeks due to that mistake, wish they would’ve called me before taking me off the books. Been going there since like January 2019. Nice people, you won’t regret going.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ21OOSIZAmYARv19W9vLxc7w/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNFNEl1UTJnRRAB
reviews.text: Words cannot express the gratitude I feel towards Reno Men's Health Clinic & Dr. Hahn with the treatment they have given me. When I first started this journey about 1 1/2 years ago I was 311 lbs & was on high blood pressure medication, had elevated cholesterol & blood sugar levels & I was told by my doctor that I needed to "make some changes" & the "sooner the better." Walking was even a chore for me & I had terrible sleep issues,  heartburn & depression.  With exercise, proper diet, a little dedication & the testosterone replacement therapy I managed to lose 102 lbs. Truly, I think my life was saved. Respect & gratitude to Dr. Hahn & his staff! Sincerely, Mike Smock

reviews.name: places/ChIJ21OOSIZAmYARv19W9vLxc7w/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZbHVMODRRRRAB
reviews.text: I love everything about this place. Professional but friendly. All the staff here are genuinely wonderful people and Dr. Hahn is amazingly knowledgeable and approachable. I can't recommend Reno Men's Health enough.
